metadata.description: Base de dados de suporte a migração de recursos Azure (Gerada automaticamente)

Microsoft.ApiManagement/service.notes: Region: using template) Move API Management across regions

Microsoft.AppService/apiapps.notes: Region: using template) Move an App Service app to another region

Microsoft.Batch/batchaccounts.notes: Region: Azure Batch accounts can't be moved directly from one region to another, but you can use a template to export a template, modify it, and deploy the template to the new region. See moving a Batch account across regions to learn more.

Microsoft.Blockchain/blockchainmembers.notes: Region: The blockchain network can't have nodes in different regions

Microsoft.CognitiveServices/Cognitive Se.notes: Region: Manual steps support this. See Move your Azure AI Search service to another Azure region to learn more.

Microsoft.Communication/communicationser.notes: Sub: Note that resources with attached phone numbers can't be moved to subscriptions in different data locations or subscriptions that don't support phone numbers

Microsoft.Compute/availabilitysets.notes: Region: Use Azure Resource Mover to move availability sets

Microsoft.Compute/disks.notes: Region: Use Azure Resource Mover to move Azure VMs and related disks

Microsoft.Compute/snapshots.notes: RG: Full No - Incremental; Sub: Full No - Incremental; Region: Full No - Incremental

Microsoft.DBforMariaDB/servers.notes: Region: You can use a cross-region read replica to move an existing server. See the corresponding move guidance to learn more. If the service is provisioned with geo-redundant backup storage, you can use geo-restore to restore in other regions. Learn more.

Microsoft.DBforMySQL/servers.notes: Region: You can use a cross-region read replica to move an existing server. Learn more.

Microsoft.DBforPostgreSQL/servers.notes: Region: You can use a cross-region read replica to move an existing server. Learn more.

Microsoft.DevSpaces/AKS cluster.notes: RG: pending; Sub: pending; Region: Learn more about moving to another region

Microsoft.DigitalTwins/digitaltwinsinsta.notes: Region: by recreating resources in new region. Learn more

Microsoft.EventGrid/eventsubscriptions.notes: RG: ; can't be moved independently but move automatically with a subscribed resource; Sub: ; can't be moved independently but move automatically with a subscribed resource

Microsoft.EventHub/namespaces.notes: Region: with template) Relocate Azure Event Hubs to another region

Microsoft.IoTHub/iothub.notes: Region: clone hub) Clone an Azure IoT Hub to another region

Microsoft.Maps/accounts.notes: Region: ; Azure Maps is a geospatial service

Microsoft.MobileNetwork/mobileNetworks.notes: Region: Move your private mobile network resources to a different region

Microsoft.MobileNetwork/mobileNetworks/d.notes: Region: Move your private mobile network resources to a different region

Microsoft.MobileNetwork/mobileNetworks/s.notes: Region: Move your private mobile network resources to a different region
Region: Move your private mobile network resources to a different region
Region: Move your private mobile network resources to a different region

Microsoft.MobileNetwork/packetCoreContro.notes: Region: Move your private mobile network resources to a different region
Region: Move your private mobile network resources to a different region
Region: Move your private mobile network resources to a different region

Microsoft.MobileNetwork/sims.notes: Region: Move your private mobile network resources to a different region

Microsoft.MobileNetwork/simGroups.notes: Region: Move your private mobile network resources to a different region

Microsoft.MobileNetwork/simGroups/sims.notes: Region: Move your private mobile network resources to a different region

Microsoft.MobileNetwork/packetCoreContro.notes: Region: Move your private mobile network resources to a different region

Microsoft.Network/loadbalancers.notes: RG: Basic SKU Yes - Standard SKU; Sub: Basic SKU No - Standard SKU; Region: Use Azure Resource Mover to move internal and external load balancers

Microsoft.Network/networkinterfaces.notes: Region: Use Azure Resource Mover to move NICs

Microsoft.Network/networksecuritygroups.notes: Region: Use Azure Resource Mover to move network security groups

Microsoft.Network/privateendpoints.notes: RG: for supported private-link resources No - for all other private-link resources; Sub: for supported private-link resources No - for all other private-link resources

Microsoft.Network/publicipaddresses.notes: Sub: see Networking move guidance; Region: Use Azure Resource Mover to move public IP address configurations (IP addresses are not retained

Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults.notes: Region: Using Azure Backup to move Recovery Services vaults across Azure regions isn't supported. You can use Azure Site Recovery to disable and recreate the vault in the target region for Recovery Services vaults

Microsoft.Resources/deploymentscripts.notes: Region: Move Microsoft.Resources resources to new regions

Microsoft.Resources/templatespecs.notes: Region: Move Microsoft.Resources resources to new regions.

Microsoft.ServiceBus/namespaces.notes: Region: with template) Move an Azure Service Bus namespace to another region

Microsoft.Sql/managedinstances.notes: Region: Learn more about moving managed instances across regions

Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases.notes: Region: Learn more about moving databases across regions. Learn more about using Azure Resource Mover to move Azure SQL databases

Microsoft.Sql/servers/elasticpools.notes: Region: Learn more about moving elastic pools across regions. Learn more about using Azure Resource Mover to move Azure SQL elastic pools

Microsoft.Storage/storageaccounts.notes: Region: Relocate an Azure Storage account to another region.
